settings.name: show_username
settings.label: Login username
settings.help: What field user uses to log in

settings.name: email_confirmation
settings.label: Email confirmation
settings.help: If yes, user must confirm email before login. If no, confirmation email is still sent but login is allowed.

settings.name: login_link
settings.label: Link to login
settings.help: Guest redirect target and header login CTA

settings.name: user_link
settings.label: Link to user
settings.help: Redirect after successful login or registration

settings.name: default_access
settings.label: Default access
settings.help: Granted to new users on register (merged with existing keys)
